TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_P_Ramlee, title = P_Ramlee, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/P_Ramlee} }

S.FORM: == P. Ramlee == u siwkay niza u sapuyaay a kakuniza u kawaw niza u kawlah niza u nalimaan niza == namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan ==
S.PHON: == p. *amr~ɾəə == u siwkaj niza u sapujaaj a kakuniza u kawaw niza u kawr~ɾaħ niza u nar~ɾimaan niza == namakajniaj a nasur~ɾitan nasakamuan atu natinəŋan ==
S.FORM: == P. Ramlee == u siwkay niza u sapuyaay a kakuniza u kawaw niza u kawlah niza u nalimaan niza == namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan ==
S.PHON: == p. *amr~ɾəə == u siwkaj niza u sapujaaj a kakuniza u kawaw niza u kawr~ɾaħ niza u nar~ɾimaan niza == namakajniaj a nasur~ɾitan nasakamuan atu natinəŋan ==
